name: Typeform
description: Typeform is a form and survey platform that creates conversational, one-question-at-a-time experiences. Use this API to create forms programmatically, retrieve form definitions and their responses, count submissions, and manage your forms. Supports various question types including multiple choice, short text, long text, rating, opinion scale, and more.

capabilities.name: list_forms
capabilities.description: List all forms in your Typeform account with pagination support.

capabilities.name: get_form
capabilities.description: Retrieve the full definition of a specific form including all fields, logic jumps, and settings.

capabilities.name: create_form
capabilities.description: Create a new form with specified title, fields, and settings.

capabilities.name: get_responses
capabilities.description: Retrieve all submitted responses for a specific form with filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: get_response_count
capabilities.description: Get the total number of responses submitted to a specific form.

capabilities.name: delete_form
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a form and all its associated responses.
